title: Adult mouse liver dissociation (on ice)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"c80hv","text":"This protocol is used to dissociate adult (10 week) CD-1 mouse liver \"on ice\", preserving authentic gene expression profiles. The first layer consists of 3.5 hours rotation at 4 °C in 0.25% trypsin, and the second layer consists of 15 min. in bacillus licheniformis, with trituration on ice. The yield is 5000 cells/mg with 97% viability (as measured by trypan blue). ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":243,"length":22}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines:
{"blocks":[{"key":"bl6r8","text":"Trypsin Enzyme Mix","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3fvui","text":"500 µL DPBS (ThermoFisher cat. # 14190) / BSA 0.1% (0.05% BSA/DPBS final conc.)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"364jp","text":"500 µL Trypsin 0.5%/EDTA – 0.25% final conc. (ThermoFisher, cat. # 15400054)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fq4vh","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d41d0","text":"Bacillus Licheniformis Enzyme Mix","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":33},{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":22}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6o4ho","text":"899 µL DPBS (ThermoFisher, cat. # 14190)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"816eq","text":"1 µL 0.5 M EDTA (0.5 mM final) (Sigma, A8806)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4nqpb","text":"100 µL Bacillus Licheniformis 100 mg/mL - 10 mg/mL final conc. (Sigma, P5380)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":7,"length":23}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3vsbl","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8jcft","text":"Preparing enzymes:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fpp8g","text":"The bacillus licheniformis is made up in DPBS (#14190). It is aliquoted and stored at -80 ºC at 100 mg/mL in 100 µL aliquots.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":4,"length":22}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8bhih","text":"The trypsin is aliquoted and stored at -20 ºC.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dtp43","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ath0l","text":"Required Equipment & Consumables:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":33}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a31ev","text":"Refrigerated centrifuge","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"flhkt","text":"Fisher tube rotator, cat. # 88-861-051 (or similar rotation device)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"rop8","text":"Pipettes and pipet tips (MLS)
15, 50 ml Conicals (MLS)
1.5 mL tubes (MLS)
30 µM filters (MACS SmartStrainers, 130-098-458)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"49bk9","text":"Petri dishes (MLS)
Razor blades (MLS)
Ice bucket w/ice (MLS)
Hemocytometers - InCyto Neubauer Improved (DHC-NO1-5)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b6ogb","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4amv7","text":"Required reagents: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8i3is","text":"Red Blood Cell Lysis Buffer - Sigma (R7757)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1huv7","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eo6gk","text":"The protocol workflow is as follows: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":37}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"al1og","text":"Isolate liver","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c41rj","text":"First layer","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"de0g5","text":"Second layer","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"47bia","text":"Preparing cells for Chromium/DropSeq","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"bqm0j","text":"-Prepare enzyme mixes and leave on ice. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6ktdd","text":"-Cool centrifuges to 4 °C.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3s4il","text":"-Isolate and transport tissue in ice-cold DPBS. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Dissect out liver tissue and immerse/transport in ice-cold PBS.

Using sterile forceps, place tissue on petri dish on ice. Remove excess DPBS using pipet. Mince tissue thoroughly on petri dish on ice (~2 min) until fine paste. Manipulate tissue with forceps while mincing with razor blade. 00:02:00, mince on ice
Add 18 mg tissue to 1 mL trypsin enzyme mix. Shake tube vigorously to re-suspend tissue. undetermined, minced tissue

Leave digest mix rotating at 4 °C for 3.5 hrs on Fisher tube rotator. Every 45 min (4X total), stop rotation briefly and shake tube vigorously to re-suspend tissue. 03:30:00, rotate at 4 °C 00:45:00, shake vigorously
After 3.5 hours, transfer digest mix to 15 mL conical & add 10 mL ice-cold DPBS to dilute trypsin mix. Re-suspend digest mix. undetermined, ice-cold DPBS
Spin 300 g for 5 min at 4 °C to pellet cells and tissue chunks. Remove supernatant. 00:05:00, spin 300 g 4 °C

After tissue chunks have settled to bottom of tube, transfer 75% of supernatant, containing released cells onto 30 µM filter on 50 mL conical. Rinse filter with 6 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%. Save filter and flow-through for next steps. undetermined, pipet off supernatant undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%
To tissue clumps at bottom of tube, add 1 mL bacillus licheniformis enzyme mix. Triturate 10X. undetermined, bacillus licheniformis enzyme mix

Continue incubating on ice in bacillus licheniformis enzyme mix. Shake every minute and triturate 10X every 2 min for 15 additional minutes (3 hr. 45 min total time) until the majority of clumps are broken up. 00:15:00, incubate on ice 00:02:00, triturate 10x every 2 min
Transfer entire volume of digest mix to the same 30 µM filter. Rinse filter with 5 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%. undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%
Re-suspend and transfer flow-through containing cells to 15 mL conical.
Spin 300 g for 5 min at 4 °C. Remove supernatant (down to ~100 µL) and leave in 15 mL conical. 00:05:00, 300 g for 5 min 4 °C
Add 1 mL RBC lysis buffer; triturate 20X; let sit 2 min. on ice. undetermined, RBC lysis buffer 00:02:00, incubate on ice
After 2 min., add 5 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04% and re-suspend cells. undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%
Spin 1800 RPM (low-speed spin) for 3 minutes at 4 °C to pellet cells and leave the majority of debris in supernatant. 00:03:00, spin 1800 RPM 4 °C

Remove supernatant; re-suspend cells in ~100 µL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04% and analyze using hemocytometer with trypan blue. Adjust cell concentration to 1,000 cells/µL for Chromium or 100 cells/µL for DropSeq. undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%
Re-suspend cells and tissue in 1 mL ice-cold DPBS and transfer to 1.5 mL tube. Let chunks settle one minute on ice (released cells should remain in supernatant). 00:01:00, let chunks settle on ice
Add re-suspended cells to new 30 µM filter on 50 mL conical; rinse filter with 7 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%. Transfer flow-through to 15 mL conical. undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%
creator: Andrew Potter
